# Codex Overlay

This file defines Codex-specific behavior on top of the shared base policy.

## Inherits

- `../base-policy.md`
- `../release-policy.md`
- `../domain/lint-rules.md`

## Codex-Specific Guidance

- User may communicate in Chinese, but Codex responses must be in Japanese or English.
- Code and documentation produced by Codex must remain Japanese or English only.
- Preserve lint ruleset SDK conventions defined in domain policy.
